architecture.title: Architecture Case Study
architecture.subtitle: Why these choices, and how data flows through the system.
architecture.frontendBody: Next.js 14 App Router with React Server Components, streamed from Vercel Edge for low latency in Ontario and globally.
architecture.apiBody: Route handlers using ISR for cached GitHub data, plus serverless functions for Supabase writes.
architecture.databaseBody: Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security and Realtime subscriptions powers the global leaderboard.
architecture.deploymentBody: Vercel Edge Runtime with GitHub Actions enforcing type check, lint, and build on every push.
